rationale.R1.2: The revision identifies and addresses a key consistency issue with the original claim about BLEU scores not being calibration metrics.
rationale.R1.4: The revision names one prior work (COMET) but does not provide sufficient contrast with other relevant approaches.
rationale.R1.7: The revision does not identify any missing or wrong citations.
rationale.RX.1: The revision flags uncertainty for the claim about calibration gains transferring to unseen language pairs, which is a reasonable assessment given the limited evidence provided.
rationale.RX.3: The revision stays mostly within the scope of the original prompt, focusing on improving the quality of NMT outputs.
rationale.RX.4: The revision does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The revision does not provide traceability for the changes made to the text.
